summary: Backend API testing completed for Iteration 4 - Recharge Features. All 137 tests passing (35 new + 102 existing). Verified: operators (4), circles (25), plans with filters, preview calculation, coin settings, cashback rules CRUD, admin user management (adjust-coins, block/unblock), full recharge flow with coins/cashback, admin stats, admin recharges list with user info.
critical_code_review_comments: All new recharge endpoints correctly implemented with proper validation
Coin settings: coins_per_rupee=10, max_coins_per_recharge=50 working correctly
Cashback calculation: fixed and percent types supported with operator-specific rules
Recharge flow: Final = Amount - Cashback - CoinDiscount, coins_earned = cashback * coins_per_rupee
Block user prevents recharge with 403 'Account is blocked' response
Admin adjust-coins caps at 0 for negative deltas (no negative coin balance)
Admin recharges list includes user_name and user_mobile joined from users collection
seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix mobile numbers during test execution. Cashback rules and recharge plans created/deleted during tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working. Iteration 4 adds 15+ new endpoints for recharge flow. Key endpoints tested: GET /api/recharge/operators (4 operators), GET /api/recharge/circles (25 circles), GET /api/recharge/plans (with operator/category filters), POST /api/recharge/preview, POST /api/admin/coin-settings, GET /api/admin/coin-settings, POST /api/admin/cashback-rules, GET /api/admin/cashback-rules, DELETE /api/admin/cashback-rules/{id}, POST /api/admin/recharge-plans, GET /api/admin/recharge-plans, DELETE /api/admin/recharge-plans/{id}, POST /api/admin/users/adjust-coins, POST /api/admin/users/block, GET /api/admin/recharge-stats, GET /api/admin/recharges, POST /api/recharge. Admin credentials: mobile=9999999999, password=Admin@123, PIN=1234.
